aiMetrics.summary: Video-based analysis for Shooting Guard in Basketball shows strongest movement efficiency and improvement headroom in stamina estimation.
suggestions: Upload a longer continuous performance sequence to better reflect endurance.
Use a clearer camera angle and steady framing to improve technique analysis quality.
Include more high-intensity action moments to improve movement and reaction assessment.
